Package HWSystem

Class HWSystem

  • java.lang.Object
    • HWSystem.HWSystem
  • public class HWSystem
extends java.lang.Object
    HWSystem class Main interface for the user to do operations with devices

      • HWSystem

        public HWSystem​(java.lang.String configPath,
                java.lang.String logPath)

        Parameters:
        configPath - Path to the configuration file
        logPath - Path to the directory where log files will be created

    • Method Detail

      • addDevice

        public void addDevice​(java.lang.String devName,
                      int portID,
                      int devID)
        Add a device to the system
        Parameters:
        devName - Device name
        portID - Port ID
        devID - Device ID

      • removeDevice

        public void removeDevice​(int portID)
        Remove a device from the system
        Parameters:
        portID - Port ID of the device to remove

      • turnDeviceON

        public void turnDeviceON​(int portID)
        Turn a device ON
        Parameters:
        portID - Port ID of the device to turn on

      • turnDeviceOFF

        public void turnDeviceOFF​(int portID)
        Turn a device OFF
        Parameters:
        portID - Port ID of the device to turn off
